data.title: Elon Musk Announces Tesla Semi 'Will Be Available Worldwide' Amid Growing Skepticism Over 500-Mile Range And Autonomous Features
data.description: Elon Musk has announced the global launch of the Tesla Inc Semi truck on social media platform X, as demand for the electric vehicle continues to grow.

data.title: Jim Cramer Gets Loudly Interrupted By 'Jealous' Apple Watch — Device Goes Absolutely Nuts Just As He Begins To Talk About Luxury Watchmaker Breitling
data.description: During a segment discussing luxury watchmaker Breitling, Jim Cramer's Apple Watch humorously interrupted his show, leading to laughs as Cramer joked about the smartwatch's jealousy.
